evals.prompt: I'm building a new learnr tutorial for PHM 704 Pharmacokinetics and need to set up Google Sheets tracking for session logging and question events. Where do I start?
evals.expected_output: Complete walkthrough: create sheet, rename sessions tab, share with service account, run setup_tracking_sheets(), wire SHEET_ID into deploy.R, add to Analytics Dashboard SHEET_IDS and SHEETS, redeploy dashboard.

evals.prompt: I already created the Google Sheet for the NSC Labs and renamed Sheet1 to sessions. What do I do next?
evals.expected_output: Picks up mid-workflow: share with service account (with instructions on finding client_email), run setup_tracking_sheets(), update SHEET_ID in deploy.R, wire into Analytics Dashboard, redeploy.

evals.prompt: The NSC Labs tutorials are deployed and writing to the tracking sheet fine, but the data isn't showing up in the analytics dashboard. What am I missing?
evals.expected_output: Dashboard-wiring focused: add entry to SHEET_IDS in Analytics-Dashboard/deploy.R, add entry to SHEETS in Analytics-Dashboard/app.R with correct env var key and label, redeploy dashboard.
